name: Easy Pineapple Pie
recipeIngredient: 3.5 ounces Baking powder box lemon pudding/pie mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple well.
2. Combine the pudding mix and milk in a medium bowl. Beat until very thick, about 2-3 minutes.
3. Fold in the whipped topping, pineapple, lemon juice, and lemon zest.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie crust.
5. Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight.
6. Garnish with pineapple chunks and mint sprigs before serving.
This is really great for those hot summer nights! Calories: 266 per serving (but low in cholesterol!)
